How Much Does a Logo Design Cost in the UK in 2026?

Author: Kay | Published: 2026-04-12

Logo design costs in the UK vary wildly — from £50 on freelancer marketplaces to £10,000+ at top agencies. But price alone does not determine quality. What matters is the process: research, concepts, revisions, and final file delivery. At Creative Kaygency, we offer professional logo design starting from just 150 credits.
